page_title: Music from Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance
text:
Music from Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance is the soundtrack album of the 2009 film Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance, composed by Shirō Sagisu, published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICA-984, and released on 08 July 2009. http://vgmdb.net/album/19800
